## Kimi K2.6 Pricing
Kimi K2.6 is Moonshot AI's most capable open-source model, built for long-horizon coding, frontend design generation, 300-agent swarms, and native multimodal workflows. Unlike a standalone product, K2.6 is accessed through your existing Kimi membership or directly via token-based API billing — making it available at every price point from free to enterprise.
App Membership
Starts at **$19/month (Moderato)** and gives you K2.6 inside the Kimi chat interface with agent credits, Deep Research, Kimi Code access, and Slides and Websites tools included. Higher tiers — **Allegretto ($39)** , **Allegro ($99)** , and **Vivace ($199)** — unlock Agent Swarm with up to 300 parallel subagents, more Kimi Code credits, Kimi Claw cloud deployment, and significantly larger Professional Data quotas.
API Access

results.title: Kimi Code 2026: Plans, Pricing & Complete Developer Guide | NxCode
excerpts:
# Kimi Code 2026: Plans, Pricing & Complete Developer Guide
## Key Takeaways
* **Kimi Code is Moonshot AI's premium coding tier** , powered by the K2.5 model with 256K context and 100 tok/s output speed -- purpose-built for terminal-based developer workflows.
* **API pricing at $0.60/$2.50 per MTok** (input/output) is 4-17x cheaper than GPT-5.4 and 5-6x cheaper than Claude Sonnet 4.6, with an additional 75% cache discount on repeated prompts.
* **Agent Swarm coordinates up to 100 parallel sub-agents** , cutting execution time by 4.5x on parallelizable tasks like batch refactoring and large-scale code generation.
* **Direct CLI integrations** with Claude Code and Roo Code mean you can plug Kimi K2.5 into your existing terminal workflow without switching tools.
* **5-hour token quota system** allocates 300-1,200 API calls per window with max concurrency of 30 -- enough for sustained coding sessions but requires quota awareness for heavy usage.

Kimi Code is Moonshot AI's premium coding tier that pairs the Kimi K2.5 model with a terminal-first developer experience. It costs approximately $19/month for membership with API fees billed separately at $0.60/$2.50 per million tokens (input/output) -- making it 4-17x cheaper than GPT-5.4 for equivalent coding tasks. This guide covers everything developers need to know: plans, pricing, setup, and how Kimi Code fits alongside tools like Claude Code and Cursor.

...

## Plans and Pricing
### Membership Tiers
[Kimi Code membership](https://kimik2ai.com/pricing/) costs approximately $19/month. This provides:
* Access to the Kimi Code CLI and developer tools
* Priority compute allocation during peak hours
* A 5-hour rolling token quota of 300-1,200 API calls (depending on model and mode)
* Maximum concurrency of 30 simultaneous requests
* Full access to all four operating modes including Agent Swarm

## Plan details

basic

[Buy now](https://www.kimi.com/code)

### Moderato
recommended
**¥99** /month
¥948 yearly (about ¥79/month)
* Larger token quota every 7 days
* Multi-device shared access
* Kimi CLI / Claude Code / Roo Code support

Higher-frequency users and developers who switch between devices.
[Buy now](https://www.kimi.com/code)

...

## FAQ
Clarify limits, usage models and trade-offs before you subscribe.
What is the difference between Andante and Moderato?
Moderato offers a larger token quota and shared multi-device access. Both refresh every 7 days.
How is quota calculated?
Kimi describes a 5-hour token quota and a 7-day refresh cycle. In practice, that roughly maps to hundreds of API calls depending on workflow intensity.
What is the 3x expansion promo?
Campaign messaging says coding quota is multiplied by three during the promo window. Check the official Kimi page for the latest status.
Which tools are supported?
Kimi CLI, Kimi Code for VS Code, Claude Code and Roo Code are the primary integrations listed.
How does yearly billing work?
Andante yearly is ¥468 and Moderato yearly is ¥948, which lowers the effective monthly cost.
Prices come from provider websites and can change at any time. Some links on this site are referral links, which may earn us a small commission at no extra cost to you.

results.title: Moonshot AI's Kimi Work Brings 300 AI Agents to Your Desktop - Decrypt
excerpts:
# Moonshot AI's Kimi Work Brings 300 AI Agents to Your Desktop
## The brewing war in the agentic AI era
The difference with Kimi Work is the local-first design paired with a 300-agent swarm. Most competitors either run everything in a cloud sandbox—which can't touch real logged-in sessions—or offer desktop control without coordinated parallel agents. Kimi Work does both. The tradeoff is this: When your laptop is closed, tasks stop. Moonshot's own cloud product, Kimi Claw, runs 24/7 without your machine.
The app is a free download. Meaningful agent features require a paid plan. Moonshot's Moderato tier starts at $19/month and includes K2.6, Deep Research, and Kimi Code access.
The Agent Swarm with limited sub-agents unlocks at Allegretto ($39/month), while the full 300-agent swarm and highest-volume professional workflows require the Allegro ($99/month) or Vivace ($199/month) tiers for those who _really_ need 300 agents.

Section titled “Kimi K2.6 model support”
Added support for Moonshot’s Kimi K2.6 model (via Fireworks and self-hosted local Kimi K2.6), including routing, pricing, and tokenizer settings. You can pick it from the model selector alongside the existing Kimi variants.

Prices in USD per 1M tokens

| Kimi K2.6 |  |  |  |
Latest Moonshot flagship; top-tier code generation & long-context reasoning |$1 |$4 |128,000 |
|Kimi K2
Proven Moonshot model; excellent multilingual & document understanding |$0.6 |$2.5 |128,000 |

Classic Moonshot model; 128K context; widely integrated in production apps |$2 |$5 |128,000 |

## Estimated Monthly Cost (70% input / 30% output split)
| Model | 1M tokens/mo | 10M tokens/mo | 100M tokens/mo | 1B tokens/mo |
| Kimi K2.6 | $1.90 | $19.00 | $190 | $1,900 |
| Kimi K2 | $1.17 | $11.70 | $117 | $1,170 |
| Moonshot V1 (128K) | $2.90 | $29.00 | $290 | $2,900 |

## Frequently Asked Questions
### How much does Kimi (Moonshot AI) LLM API cost?
Kimi (Moonshot AI) offers 3 models ranging from $0.600/1M to $2.00/1M input tokens. Moonshot AI's Kimi series, known for exceptional long-context understanding and code generation. Kimi K2.6 is the latest flagship; K2 is the widely-proven stable version. Direct international API available.
